About.title: EXPERIENCE
About.role: ROLE: Fullstack Developer. Stack: React / Next.js / TypeScript / Node.js.
About.e2e: END-TO-END: High-performance SaaS, MVP, and business logic development. Integrations: AmoCRM, YooKassa, Robokassa.
About.frontend: FRONTEND: SPA/SSR architecture. Advanced UI/UX systems, custom animations, and WebGL/3D (React Three Fiber).
About.backend: BACKEND: Relational & NoSQL database schema design. Async process optimization (workers, webhooks, data parsing).
About.infrastructure: INFRASTRUCTURE: Containerization (Docker), web servers (Nginx), process management (PM2), and SSL certification.

About-tab.title: CAT SYSTEM_CORE_PROFILE.MD --VERBOSE
About-tab.overview_text: 3.5 years of commercial development experience. Specializing in scalable Fullstack applications (SSR/SPA) and integration layers. Core focus: fault-tolerant server architecture, end-to-end API integrations, database management, and CI/CD pipeline automation.
About-tab.workflow_text_1: ► Data-Driven Design: Analyze business logic and map out entity-relationship (ER) diagrams before writing code. Prioritize strict typing and service-oriented separation of concerns.
About-tab.workflow_text_2: ► Legacy & Bug Tracking: Preventative approach to legacy code — write test coverage prior to refactoring, isolate outdated modules using patterns, and patch issues via rigorous checklist routines.
About-tab.ai_text_1: ► Routine Optimization: Leverage AI (Gemini, Cursor) as a smart co-processor for bootstrapping boilerplate, dynamic UI generation, initial migrations, and unit tests, saving up to 40% of setup time.
About-tab.ai_text_2: ► Quality Assurance: Utilize AI for heavy log parsing and anomaly detection. Architectural review, security auditing, and complex SQL query optimization remain strictly manual tasks.
About-tab.hobby_text_1: ► Network Infrastructure: Architect and manage custom local network environments. Deploy dedicated routing gateways and secure VPN tunnels to maintain seamless access and eliminate environment conflicts.
About-tab.hobby_text_2: ► Self-Hosted Ecosystems: Maintain local media servers (Jellyfin) and cloud microservices packed into Docker environments. Automate automated data backups, lifecycle management, and storage arrays.

t-catalog-admin.title: T-Catalog — Admin Panel
t-catalog-admin.shortDesc: Internal ERP/CRM management dashboard for administrators.
t-catalog-admin.fullDesc: A secure portal for content orchestrating, data moderation, and event analysis. Features advanced data grid processing, role-based controls, and custom analytics graphs.

t-catalog-client.title: T-Catalog — Client Application
t-catalog-client.fullDesc: Public-facing digital catalog with comprehensive SEO optimizations and server-side rendering pipelines. Configured with dynamic faceted search and localized routing.

rulme-admin.title: Rulme — Operator Dashboard
rulme-admin.shortDesc: Administrative back-office console for booking dispatchers.
rulme-admin.fullDesc: Dispatch management interface for supervising an on-demand automotive services marketplace. Enables real-time chat monitoring, master registration vetting, and financial verification.

rulme-client.title: Rulme — Customer Ecosystem
rulme-client.shortDesc: Telegram Mini App for on-demand automotive technician search.
rulme-client.fullDesc: An interactive digital product serving car owners seeking technical help. Features concurrent real-time chat spaces via Supabase, unified userId transitions, and custom anonymous onboarding pipelines.

features.2: Strict separation of welcome and referral triggers

bitovki36.title: Bitovki 36 CRM
bitovki36.shortDesc: Corporate operational dashboard for industrial logistics.
bitovki36.fullDesc: Tailored enterprise engine focused on supply chain execution, tracking inventory values, and unifying production documentation logs.
